Get and save a user github token to their database object. This allows subsequent queries for github data from the users scope.

Issue a signed OAuth state token for the GitHub user-authorization flow and return the GitHub authorize URL the client should redirect to. Optionally remembers a dashboard path to return the user to after the round-trip.

Get repository info
Links a github repo to a Scalar github project
List commits from the GitHub repo backing a `provider: github` DocsProject

Get and save a user Bitbucket token to their database object. This allows subsequent queries for Bitbucket data from the user scope.

Issue a signed OAuth state token for the Bitbucket user-authorization flow and return the Bitbucket authorize URL the client should redirect to. Optionally remembers a dashboard path to return the user to after the round-trip.
List the calling user's Bitbucket workspaces and the repositories they can write to. Used by the link-to-Bitbucket UI.
List branches on the Bitbucket repo backing a `provider: 'bitbucket'` DocsProject. Supports prefix search via the `query` param.
Wipe the calling user's Bitbucket OAuth tokens. Any DocsProjects this user linked will lose their token and need to be re-linked or have the linker swap accounts on Bitbucket.
Wipe the calling user's GitHub OAuth tokens. Any DocsProjects this user linked will lose their token; the user can reconnect at any time.

Get Forgejo git credentials for the authenticated user
Create a unified DocsProject backed by the chosen VCS provider (forgejo, github, or bitbucket)

Delete a unified DocsProject. Tears down deploys + publish records + cached builds, repoints user activeProjectUid, deletes the Forgejo repo (if any), and notifies subscribers. User-owned GitHub repos are left untouched.
Get a unified DocsProject by slug for the current team
Update editable repository settings (tracked branch, config path) on a unified DocsProject. Publish flags live in scalar.config.json.
Convert a Forgejo-backed DocsProject into a GitHub-backed one. Reads every file from the Forgejo repo and opens a single PR on the chosen GitHub repo putting the content under scalar-docs/.
Convert a GitHub-backed DocsProject back to a Forgejo-backed one. Migrates the GitHub repository contents into a fresh Forgejo repo and flips the project provider.
Convert a Forgejo-backed DocsProject into a Bitbucket-backed one. Reads every file from the Forgejo repo and opens a single PR on the chosen Bitbucket repo putting the content under scalar-docs/.
Convert a Bitbucket-backed DocsProject back to a Forgejo-backed one. Migrates the Bitbucket repository contents into a fresh Forgejo repo and flips the project provider.
Re-register the Bitbucket webhook on a Bitbucket-backed DocsProject. Used to recover from a failed initial registration after the linker user is granted repo admin.
